summary: Iteration 117: Complete testing of Company Cost Configuration (Magic Number) module. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified via Playwright: FinancialSettingsPage renders with live-calculated hourly cost (42.81€/h with realistic test values), all input fields functional, Save button works with toast confirmation. CostControlPage Margins Tab displays separate Materiali and Personale bars with correct labor cost calculation (ore_lavorate × costo_orario_pieno).

calc_hourly_cost.result: PASS - Formula: (stipendi + contributi + affitto + commercialista + altri) / ore = 137000/3200 = 42.81€/h

calc_commessa_margin.test: Margin calculation with labor cost and alert levels
calc_commessa_margin.result: PASS - Includes costo_personale = ore_lavorate × costo_orario_pieno; alerts: rosso(<0%), arancione(<10%), giallo(<20%), verde(>=20%)

get_company_costs.result: PASS - Returns default config (configured=false) or saved config with calculated hourly rate

put_company_costs.result: PASS - Saves configuration and returns updated costo_orario_pieno calculation

log_hours.result: PASS - Logs hours to commessa, updates ore_lavorate total, saves log_ore array

margin_analysis_labor.result: PASS - Now includes costi_materiali, costo_personale, ore_lavorate, costo_orario_pieno for each commessa

calculation_explanation_card.shows_formula: Costo Totale Annuo / Ore Lavorabili = Costo Orario Pieno

separate_bars.personale_bar: violet-500 color, shows labor cost with hours
separate_bars.preventivo_bar: blue-500 color, shows full estimate value

test_credentials: Created test users/sessions for testing - all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Created test commessa with material costs (5000€) and logged 8.5 hours for testing - cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 117 added Company Cost Configuration (Magic Number) module. Key components: (1) cost_calculator.py service with calc_hourly_cost() and calc_commessa_margin() functions; (2) cost_control.py router with company-costs GET/PUT, commesse/{id}/ore POST endpoints; (3) FinancialSettingsPage.js at /configurazione-finanziaria with live calculation and save functionality; (4) CostControlPage.js MarginsTab now shows separate Materiali and Personale bars; (5) Menu entry 'Costo Aziendale' under 'Acquisti & Magazzino'. The company_costs collection stores per-user configuration. Formula: (stipendi + contributi + affitto + commercialista + altri) / ore_lavorabili = costo_orario_pieno.
